basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) has published the Research Associate II Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Research Associate II position. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a Ph.D. in Pharmaceutical Sciences with specialization in Pharmaceutics or a Ph.D. in Crystal Engineering with solid-state pharmaceutical chemistry, along with more than one year of postdoctoral or industry experience, are eligible to apply online on or before 26 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available bel

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable by up to 5 years for SC/ST/PH/Women and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph. D. in Pharmaceutical Sciences with specialization in Pharmaceutics, Ph.D. in Crystal Engineering with solid-state pharmaceutical chemistry, more than 1 year of postdoctoral or industry experience
qualification.details: Ph. D. in Pharmaceutical Sciences with specialization in Pharmaceutics OR Ph.D. in Crystal Engineering with solid-state pharmaceutical chemistry; With more than 1 year of postdoctoral or industry experience.

selection_process: Evaluation and shortlisting by PI Online Interview Recommendation by selection committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate-II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Hyderabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Hyderabad Research Associate II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate-II Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Associate-II position at IIT Hyderabad is July 26, 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Pharmaceutical Sciences with a specialization in Pharmaceutics or a Ph.D. in Crystal Engineering with solid-state pharmaceutical chemistry, along with more than one year of postdoctoral or industry experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-II position is 35 years. Age relaxations are provided for SC/ST/PH/Women and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 61,000, along with 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-II position in this recruitment drive by IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate-II recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate-II role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial evaluation and shortlisting by the Principal Investigator, followed by an online interview, and a final recommendation by the selection committee.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Hyderabad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 502284.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based position as a Research Associate-II at IIT Hyderabad.
